content.text:
```mdl
@ CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON‑DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (“CNDA”)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_10_nda_3

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Article 2 – Confidential Information – definition of an information item
type Information = {
    is_verbal: bool,               # true if the information was conveyed verbally
    is_marked_confidential: bool, # true if the item is clearly marked “Confidential”
    intended_confidential: bool,   # true if the parties intend it to be disclosed in confidence
    is_known_by_third: bool,       # true if the receiving party already knew it from a third person
    is_public: bool,               # true if the information is generally available to the public
    is_authorized_disclosure: bool # true if the disclosing party authorises disclosure
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The single information item that may be subject to the CNDA
entity info_item: Information

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – obligations, prohibitions and permissions derived from the CNDA
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Article 2.01 – Confidential Information definition
rule O confidentiality_definition:
    (info_item.is_marked_confidential or info_item.intended_confidential) always

@ Article 2.02 – Exclusions from Confidential Information
rule F exclusion_rule:
    (info_item.is_known_by_third or
     info_item.is_public or
     info_item.is_authorized_disclosure) implies
    not (info_item.is_marked_confidential or info_item.intended_confidential) always

@ Article 2.03 – Duty of care (simplified as an obligation to keep the item confidential)
rule O duty_of_care:
    true always

@ Article 2.05 – No disclosure to others (simplified – the receiving party must not disclose)
rule F no_disclosure_to_others:
    true always

@ Article 2.07 – Return / destruction on request (simplified – an obligation to comply)
rule O return_upon_request:
    true always

@ Article 2.08 – Responsibility for representatives (simplified – an obligation to be responsible)
rule O responsibility_for_representatives:
    true always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis – “Confidential Information may include verbally conveyed information.”
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The hypothesis is expressed as a concrete fact about the single information item.
@ It states that the item is verbal and that the parties intend it to be confidential.
fact hypothesis_is_verbal:
    info_item.is_verbal = true

fact hypothesis_intended_confidential:
    info_item.intended_confidential = true
```
